deploy.startCommand: php artisan migrate --force && php artisan config:cache && php artisan route:cache && php artisan view:cache && (while true; do php -d max_execution_time=0 -d memory_limit=512M artisan queue:work --queue=publishing,drafting,metrics,default --tries=1 --timeout=300 --sleep=3 --max-time=3600 >> /tmp/queue-worker.log 2>&1; echo "[$(date)] worker exited; restarting in 2s" >> /tmp/queue-worker.log; sleep 2; done &) && (while true; do php artisan schedule:run --no-interaction >> /tmp/scheduler.log 2>&1; sleep 60; done &) && php artisan serve --host=0.0.0.0 --port=$PORT
